aboutSection.title: Design, Code, And Loud Visuals.
aboutSection.summary: I'm Kyle De Vares, a creative digital artist with strong skills in Photoshop, branding, and illustration. I run a freelance commission service and online store, blending design and tech to deliver bold, custom visuals.

featuredSection.title: Featured Work
featuredSection.description: A selection of recent projects showcasing digital art, web development, and creative problem-solving.
